description: VERIFIED LIVE: Cloudflare via your logged-in dash.cloudflare.com session (session bridge — no API token to paste). Your account, memberships, accounts and zones (domains) work cookie-only on the same-origin dash.cloudflare.com/api/v4. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account: user, memberships and zones all returned 200 with real data.

tools.name: cloudflare_user
tools.description: Your Cloudflare account (id, email, name). VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_memberships
tools.description: Your account memberships and roles. VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_zones
